title: Polish Potato and Cheese Pie
description: A hearty and comforting pie filled with potatoes, cheese, and a hint of polish flavor. Perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Peel and dice the potatoes, then boil them in salted water until tender.
In a pan, sauté the onion and butter until softened.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk, eggs, and shredded cheese.
Add the cooked potatoes and sautéed onion to the bowl and mix well.
Roll out the puff pastry and place it in a pie dish.
Fill the pie crust with the potato mixture and smooth the top.
Fold the edges of the pastry up to form a crust and brush with egg wash.
Bake the pie for 40-50 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Let the pie cool for a few minutes before serving.
